/usr/bin/cc  -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -D_GNU_SOURCE=1 -Wfloat-conversion -Og -g -DDEBUG -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-a9 -mfpu=vfpv3-d16 -fno-stack-protector -mthumb -mcpu=cortex-a9 -mfpu=vfpv3-d16 -fno-stack-protector -fmacro-prefix-map="/ACGC-PC-Port/droidports"/=/ -fmacro-prefix-map="/ACGC-PC-Port/droidports"/=/ -g -rdynamic CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/bridges/openal_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/bridges/zip_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/TTActivity.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/asset_manager.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/cursor_overlay.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/io_remap.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/libtt.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/main.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/opensles_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/patch.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/sdl2_media.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/ports/lswtcs/symtable_lswtcs.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/bridges/ctype_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/bridges/gles2_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/bridges/math_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/bridges/misc_bridges.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/bridges/pthread_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/bridges/stdio_bridge.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/jni/JString.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/jni/fake_jni.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/jni/os_Build.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/platform/common/crc32.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/platform/common/gles2_loader.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/platform/common/io_util.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/platform/common/so_util.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/platform/common/zip_util.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/platform/linux/physram.c.o CMakeFiles/lswtcs.dir/platform/linux/so_util_linux.c.o -o lswtcs  -lstdc++ -lm /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libSDL2.so -lpthread /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libz.so /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libzip.so /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libfreetype.so /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libbz2.so /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libopenal.so -lpthread -ldl
